_comment: H2/STO-3G 2-qubit qubit Hamiltonian (O'Malley et al. 2016 style, R~0.75A). E0 = exact (FCI) ground energy = min eigenvalue. The mean-field product-state baseline is ~0.021 Ha higher, so the gap budget forces an ENTANGLED ansatz that captures the correlation energy. ground_state_energy + hamiltonian_terms stay hidden here.
